ShortDescription.SourceString:
<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" size="20" Case="AllCaps">Rise from the ancient myths to reach for the shrieking stars. Complete Quests to earn V-Bucks with the Shrieking Star Quest Pack.</>

<text color="FFFD43FF">Includes:</>
ShortDescription.LocalizedString:
<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" size="20" Case="AllCaps">Rise from the ancient myths to reach for the shrieking stars. Complete Quests to earn V-Bucks with the Shrieking Star Quest Pack.</>

<text color="FFFD43FF">Includes:</>

DisclaimerText.SourceString:
<text color="FFFD43FF">Quests can only be completed in Battle Royale & Zero Build matches. Access to these experiences may be limited by parental control content rating settings.</>

<text color="FFFD43FF">V-Bucks are in-game currency that can be spent in Fortnite. You can purchase new customization items in the Shop for Fortnite Battle Royale, LEGO® Fortnite, Fortnite Festival or Rocket Racing, as well as additional content like this season's Battle Pass!</>
DisclaimerText.LocalizedString:
<text color="FFFD43FF">Quests can only be completed in Battle Royale & Zero Build matches. Access to these experiences may be limited by parental control content rating settings.</>

<text color="FFFD43FF">V-Bucks are in-game currency that can be spent in Fortnite. You can purchase new customization items in the Shop for Fortnite Battle Royale, LEGO® Fortnite, Fortnite Festival or Rocket Racing, as well as additional content like this season's Battle Pass!</>

Name.SourceString: <text color="FFFFFFFF">Shrieking Star Quest Bundle:</> Earn up to 1,000 V-Bucks as you complete applicable quests!
Name.LocalizedString: <text color="FFFFFFFF">Shrieking Star Quest Bundle:</> Earn up to 1,000 V-Bucks as you complete applicable quests!
